title: Grinhecker's modpack
description: A simple vanilla+ client-side modpack, that is compatible with many Minecraft servers.
body:
This is a Minecraft Vanilla-like quality of life modpack, that has many features.
# Why Grinhecker's modpack?
## Optimizations
This modpack contains a lot of optimization mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) and many others
## Quality of Life features
This modpack has a lot of quality of life mods such as [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam), [InventoryHUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge), [ChatPatches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches), Xaeros [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and so much more!
The QoL mods will ensure you have a great time playing Minecraft!
## Multiplayer support
This modpack is fully client-side and supports most multiplayer servers.

<details>
<summary>FreeCam and MiniMap Notice</summary>

Freecam and/or MiniMap mods may be disallowed on some servers, so you might turn them off.

How to turn off MiniMap: open your MiniMap settings ("Y" key by default) and disable minimap there.

To turn FreeCam off you need to go to Mods->FreeCam->Restrictions, set the restriction mode to blacklist and add the server you want to be blacklisted.

</details>

## Great for builders and redstoners
This modpack has a few building mods such as [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) and [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)

## Regular updates
This modpack gets updated frequently and quickly.

## Support
If something doesn't work or you want to something to be added to this modpack, message @grinhecker on discord.
